discovery.reason: No generated discovery report existed for 2026-07-03, so Radar performed a bounded fresh intake from current public research sources.
discovery.action: Added three reference-only candidate source profiles and queued Source Reviewer follow-up.

review.reason: Repository-context-aware skill security analysis may improve the review gate for all future third-party skill candidates, especially abandoned-repository hijack risk and false-positive reduction.
review.action: Verify license, code/data availability, concrete risk checklist implications, and whether this should become a reviewed source profile or Risk Auditor queue item.

review.reason: Realistic skill retrieval and refinement evaluation may define a better value metric for this repository than raw skill count.
review.action: Verify repository/license, evaluate whether retrieval/refinement findings should create a Critic or catalog-quality queue item, and decide whether to create a reviewed source profile.

review.reason: Multimodal GUI skill design may be a distinct reusable capability not represented by text-only skill formats.
review.action: Verify repository/license, redistribution rights for figures, MCP retrieval safety, and whether to create a reviewed source profile or later normalization item.

catalog.reason: Catalog/package parity was blocked because dist/catalog.json and dist/catalog.md disagreed on skill and risk counts.
catalog.action: Verified refreshed catalog surfaces on main: package.json is 0.1.3; dist/catalog.json and dist/catalog.md both report 1173 skills, 2 high-risk entries, 409 medium-risk entries, and 759 unspecified-risk entries; dist/install-manifest.json points at the expected catalog files.
catalog.blocked_by: GitHub connector previously exposed repository file reads/writes but no workflow_dispatch start action for catalog-refresh.yml.
catalog.resolution: Closed after direct connector verification confirmed catalog/package parity on default branch commit df73293fa1032c1209f19cff8b8e74fa732a0bb1.
